title: justicia chelionida
intro: Justicia chelionida, also known as Kalmegh, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and aromatic leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Justicia chelionida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and are often used to treat various ailments, including liver and skin conditions.
